角色攻略 Character Guide

娜娜莉灵属性主C深度攻略：普攻循环、九原联动和5月版本配队 Nanally Spirit Main DPS Deep Guide: Basic-Attack Cycle, Jiuyuan Synergy and May Teams

发布时间：Published: 2026-05-21 作者：异环攻略站编辑部Author: NTE Guide Editorial Team 阅读时间：14 分钟Read time: 14 min

攻略速览

娜娜莉是 5 月版本非常适合开荒与长期培养的灵属性站场主C。她的优势在于输出节奏稳定、普攻占比高、对队伍操作要求相对直观，并且能与九原这类灵属性副C形成良好联动。培养时应围绕普攻循环、暴击体系和灵属性伤害展开。

前置条件与接取方式

角色定位

灵属性站场主C / 高频普攻输出

队伍需求

聚怪副C、增伤辅助、生存或环合位

培养重点

普攻相关技能、暴击率、暴击伤害和灵伤加成

娜娜莉培养路线

围绕站场输出

1

优先提升核心输出技能

普攻与主要输出技能优先

娜娜莉的伤害节奏依赖持续站场。技能材料优先给能提高普攻链、协同追击和主要输出段的技能。

2

搭配九原聚怪

先九原聚怪挂标记，再切娜娜莉输出

娜娜莉对群时最怕敌人分散。九原长按E聚怪后，娜娜莉能更稳定地让普攻和范围追击命中多个目标。

3

保证暴击基础

前期先让暴击率达标，再追暴伤

高频输出角色如果暴击率太低，实战波动会很大。主属性正确后，副词条优先双暴。

4

控制站场时间

吃到辅助增益后集中打一轮完整循环

娜娜莉不是无限站场越久越好。辅助增益、聚怪窗口和敌人韧性状态都应纳入输出节奏。

5

根据场景调整生存位

日常追输出，高难补护盾或治疗

娜娜莉站场时间长，高难中容易承受连续伤害。输出足够时，生存位能显著提高容错。

实战难点

对群命中率

娜娜莉单人输出稳定，但对群环境需要队友创造站位条件。聚怪、控制和敌人韧性管理会直接影响她的实际伤害。

  • 小怪分散时不要急着开完整输出循环，先让九原或控制位处理站位。
  • BOSS战中注意闪避后快速回到输出距离，避免普攻链断得太频繁。
  • 辅助增益持续时间有限，先上增益再站场，不要反过来操作。

完成奖励

灵属性主C 稳定开荒 高频输出 九原联动 长期培养价值

娜娜莉的强度来自稳定循环和队伍配合。5 月版本中，只要解决聚怪和生存问题，她就是非常可靠的主C选择。

完整解析

娜娜莉适合开荒，是因为她的输出方式直观，成型路线清晰。很多角色需要复杂切换或特定窗口，而娜娜莉只要队伍给她创造安全站场和聚怪环境，就能持续输出。

九原是娜娜莉非常舒服的队友。九原提供聚怪和灵属性副C能力，能把分散小怪拉到娜娜莉输出范围内，同时帮助灵属性队伍维持更好的输出节奏。对群场景中，这种配合的收益远高于纸面面板。

词条方面不要过早追极限。开荒期正确主属性、足够暴击率和技能等级，比一件高暴伤但主属性错误的装备更有价值。等主力队伍稳定后，再逐步刷毕业副词条。

娜娜莉的弱点是站场时间长，遇到高压 BOSS 时容易因为闪避、位移或受击打断节奏。解决方式不是一味堆攻击，而是合理加入护盾、治疗或减伤角色，让她能完整打出循环。

Guide Snapshot

Nanally is one of the best Spirit on-field carries for May progression and long-term investment. She offers stable damage rhythm, high basic-attack value and straightforward team requirements. Build around basic-attack cycles, crit and Spirit damage.

Requirements and Entry

Role

Spirit on-field main DPS / high-frequency basic attacks

Team needs

Grouping sub-DPS, damage support, survival or reaction/enabler slot

Build focus

Basic-attack skills, crit rate, crit damage and Spirit damage

Nanally Build Route

Center the team around on-field output

1

Raise core damage skills

Basic attacks and main damage skills first.

Nanally depends on sustained field time. Skill books should go into basic chains, coordinated follow-ups and the main damage sequence.

2

Pair with Jiuyuan

Group and mark with Jiuyuan before Nanally takes field.

Nanally dislikes scattered enemies. Jiuyuan's hold-E grouping makes her attacks and area follow-ups hit more targets.

3

Secure crit consistency

Reach enough crit rate before stacking crit damage.

High-frequency attackers feel unstable with poor crit rate. After correct main stats, prioritize double crit sub-stats.

4

Control field time

Spend a full cycle after receiving buffs.

Nanally should not stay forever. Support duration, grouping windows and enemy toughness state should define her active time.

5

Adjust survival by content

Daily content can lean damage; hard content needs shield or healing.

Long field time means she can take repeated hits. A survival slot can raise practical damage by preventing interruption.

Practical Difficulty

Multi-target hit consistency

Nanally is stable on one target, but group fights need teammates to create positioning. Grouping, control and toughness management directly affect real damage.

  • Do not start a full cycle while small enemies are scattered.
  • In boss fights, dodge and quickly return to attack distance so the chain does not break.
  • Apply support buffs before on-field time, not after.

Rewards

Spirit main DPS Stable progression High-frequency output Jiuyuan synergy Long-term value

Nanally's strength is stable cycling with the right team. In the May version, once grouping and survival are solved, she is a very reliable main DPS.

Full Analysis

Nanally is good for progression because her output is intuitive and her build path is clear. She does not require an overly complex swap pattern to function.

Jiuyuan is one of her most comfortable partners. Grouping and Spirit sub-DPS value let Nanally's on-field time hit more targets, especially in wave content.

Do not chase extreme stats too early. Correct main stats, enough crit rate and skill levels beat a high crit-damage piece with the wrong main stat.

Her weakness is long field time. In high-pressure boss fights, shields, healing or damage reduction may increase output more than another pure damage stat.
